phases.title: Tokenizer
phases.description: Implement tokenize(expression): split on whitespace into Number/Operator tokens. Return ParseError('empty') for blank input and ParseError('malformed-number', token) for any token that is neither an operator nor a valid decimal. (pytest contract; fast feedback)
phases.proof: uv run --python 3.13 --with pytest --with hypothesis pytest locked/tests/test_phase1_tokenize.py -q

phases.title: Evaluator
phases.description: Implement evaluate(tokens): a stack machine for + - * /. Return EvalError('insufficient-operands') on underflow, EvalError('too-many-operands') if more than one value remains, and EvalError('division-by-zero') for division by zero. (pytest contract; fast feedback)
phases.proof: uv run --python 3.13 --with pytest --with hypothesis pytest locked/tests/test_phase2_evaluate.py -q

phases.title: Public API
phases.description: Implement calc(expression): tokenize then evaluate, propagating ParseError/EvalError. (pytest contract; fast feedback)
phases.proof: uv run --python 3.13 --with pytest --with hypothesis pytest locked/tests/test_phase3_calc.py -q

phases.title: Sealed gate
phases.description: Authoritative, tamper-resistant gate: runs calc() out of process against a trusted oracle on unpredictable inputs. The pytest phases above are agent feedback and can be fooled from inside the test process; this phase cannot — passing it requires actually computing calc.
